description:
Use a single keyboard and mouse between multiple computers

Use the keyboard and mouse of one computer to control nearby computers. Copy and paste between all of your computers with shared clipboard. Works on Windows, macOS, and Linux.
Bug fixes
- Could not enable run at login screen on macOS
- Error: ip or hostname is required when connecting a peer
- Error: libpugixml.so.1: cannot open shared object file
- Icon on welcome screen is too large
- Server does not work at login screen on macOS
- Runtime error occurred: libei is not supported
- Run on the login screen is incorrectly enabled on new installation
- Some error messages contain file paths which should be anonymized
- Updating license after trial doesn't work (nothing happens)
